<!--
LLM INSTRUCTIONS FOR FILLING OUT THIS TEMPLATE:

## Overview
Write a quick, human-readable summary. Keep it casual and concise — one or two sentences
that give a reader the gist of the PR at a glance.

## Related Links
Link to any additional context: GitHub issues, Slack threads, other pull requests, design
assets, Figma links, etc. GitHub supports linking keywords for issues:
- "Closes #N" / "Fixes #N" / "Resolves #N" — auto-closes the issue on merge
- "Relates to #N" / "Blocked by #N" — references without closing

## Description
Explain what the overall changes do. Not every line of code needs to be described — focus
on the "why" and call out anything nuanced or non-obvious. Prefer bullet points, but a
short paragraph alongside bullets is fine too.

## Screenshots
Screenshots will be provided by the LLM operator. NEVER delete existing screenshot content
or the before/after table.
